prose:
**Formaldehyde Fukui reactivity (electrophilic Fukui f⁺)** — DFT single-point Fukui-reactivity at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, no density fitting) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF via the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill. Geometry: user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz, not optimized at this level (Fukui descriptors computed on that fixed geometry). SCF converged in the N, N±1 states; integrity.status = ok; integrity.trustworthy = true; no warnings reported. 

Most electrophilic site: carbon (atom 2) with f⁺ = 0.7083913 a.u.

Command run:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxuig1shb/live.json
```
